name: 𝙵𝚎𝚊𝚛 & 𝙷𝚞𝚗𝚐𝚎𝚛
description:
Delve into this shitty dungeon and do whatever you want! Try not to step on a rusty nail pls...

This was a HASSLE to make, so don't blame me if anything isn't completely accurate!!!

Also, enemies' gender can vary in this one. So do as you please!

IT'S IN MY HEAD, I WON'T LET GO
A WASTE OF TIME, YEAH THIS IS NOT GOOD FOR ME
BUT WHO'S TO SAY WHAT SO AIN'T SO
I THINK I'M FADING!!!
